title: Discover & Explore
description: A carefully crafted Vanilla+ experience focused on exploration, farming, and building — all while keeping the charm of vanilla Minecraft.
body:
![Discover & Explore Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5509e4c236defe517c68be3671d8ad91cf44d38.png) Discover & Explore is a content-rich Vanilla+ modpack designed for those who love the core of Minecraft but want a fresh and expanded experience. ✨ Explore a beautifully enriched world with new biomes, structures, and dungeons — all naturally integrated to feel like part of the base game.
✨ Farm with new crops and animals, perfect for peaceful gameplay or cozy survival setups.
✨ Build and decorate with expanded block palettes, furniture mods, and immersive details that allow for stunning homes and creative expression.
Whether you're a casual builder, an explorer at heart, or someone who enjoys laid-back progression — Discover & Explore offers the perfect balance between familiarity and freshness, delivering a modern Vanilla+ experience thoughtfully designed for long-term worlds, relaxed progression, and immersive adventures! ## ✨ FEATURES - ⚙️ **Optimized for Performance** – Runs smoothly even with shaders enabled - 🎨 **Shader-Ready** – Comes pre-installed with multiple popular shader packs so you can dive right in with visuals that suit your style - 🌍 **Completely overhauled World Generation** – Explore richer landscapes with natural terrain variety - 🏰 **Revamped Vanilla Structures** – Classic structures reimagined to feel more alive and rewarding - 🕳️ **New Dungeons & Unique Structures** – Discover hidden ruins, battle-ready dungeons, and more surprises as you explore - 🐄 **New Animals & Hostile Creatures** – More life in the wild, and more danger below - 🪑 **Expanded Building & Decoration** – A curated set of new furniture and decorative blocks for cozy or creative builds - 🧰 **Quality of Life Improvements** – Includes features like inventory sorting, zoom, /warp support for servers, and more! - 🌐 **Fully Multiplayer-Ready** – Designed for servers. The instance includes a server-data folder with all required server-side mods for an easy setup. - 📦 **184+ Carefully Selected Mods** – Balanced for stability, performance, and immersion 💡 Shader packs are enabled by default – if you like to play without them, deactivate them via the Video Settings menu. ### 🔎 Additional Credits & Notes - 🧩 **VanillaTweaks** – This modpack includes a custom resource pack built using VanillaTweaks. Full credit goes to the original creators. Visit [vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net) to explore or customize your own.
